nasb.text: Then they will know that I am the Lord, when I make the land a desolation and a waste because of all their abominations which they have committed.” ’

esv.text: Then they will know that I am the Lord, when I have made the land a desolation and a waste because of all their abominations that they have committed.

cnv.text: 我必因他們所行一切可憎惡的事，使這地非常荒涼，那時他們就知道我是耶和華。’

ccb.text: 因为他们所行的一切可憎之事，我必使这地方荒凉不堪，那时他们就知道我是耶和华。’
